description: Configure a Global Shared Pipeline Library named 'jenkins-shared-lib' with the default version 'master' using Modern SCM and the Git repository 'https://github.com/jenkins-infra/pipeline-library.git'. Create a Pipeline job named 'shared-lib-test' using a script that imports the library (@Library('jenkins-shared-lib') _) and runs a pipeline with a 'Verify' stage that echoes 'Library loaded'. Login credentials: Username: admin, Password: Admin123!
